name: AFFiNE
description: Open-source, privacy-first knowledge base and workspace combining documents, whiteboards and databases, developed by Toeverything Pte. Ltd.

years.notes: Original AFFiNE mark used from the public launch in August 2022 through early 2026 — an isometric arrangement of nested rhombuses suggesting layered blocks and modular knowledge. Same artwork ships in the BlockSuite playground and across early AFFiNE branding.

Redesigned mark announced March 30, 2026 — two triangles whose vertices trace Pursuit Curves, referencing the mathematical concept of affine transformation. Symbol-only version used for favicons and small surfaces; same artwork shipped in the AFFiNE admin auth/setup screens.

notes: 2022 source SVG ships on a 512x512 canvas; wrapped in transform="scale(0.046875)" so the SVGO convertTransform pass in tools/build-icons can bake it down to the 24x24 viewBox.
